assessor_1_raw:
ASSESSOR 1 — real_world_framing_009 (Run 3)

Merchant agreement compliance audit is mandatory before full deployment. Long-tail suppression reduces catalog health. Both deployment-specific concerns not captured in CTR optimization.
assessor_2_raw:
ASSESSOR 2 — real_world_framing_009 (Run 3)

Contractual compliance risk from impression concentration is the primary concern. Catalog health is secondary. CTR lift is real and not disputed.
assessor_3_raw:
ASSESSOR 3 — real_world_framing_009 (Run 3)

Both issues present. Merchant audit required before deployment. Catalog health monitoring recommended post-deployment.
synthesis_raw:
SYNTHESIS — real_world_framing_009 (Ensemble, Run 3)

All three assessors identify both issues. Unanimous: merchant impression guarantee audit before deployment, catalog health monitoring post-deployment.

EMPIRICAL TEST SPECIFICATION: Audit all contracted merchants' impression shares under new model rankings before full deployment. Post-deployment: monitor catalog breadth.

empirical_test.condition: Pre-deployment merchant impression audit; post-deployment catalog breadth monitoring.
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: All merchants meet minimums; catalog breadth stable.
